projectDescription: A blazingly fast text editor written in Rust built on top of egui and iced frameworks
keyFeatures: Syntax highlighting with tree-sitter support for Rust, JavaScript, TypeScript, and Python
Vim motions and vim-style command input for efficient text editing
Fuzzy file finder for quick navigation
VS Code-style command palette for easy access to commands
Custom theming system with Lua-based configuration
File tree navigation with collapsible sidebar
Find and replace functionality with regex support
Terminal integration for running shell commands
publicApiSurface: EditorPreferences - Tab size, spaces/tabs, theme selection
Command Palette - Theme, Settings, Open File, Open Folder, Save File, New File, Save As, Toggle Terminal, Find and Replace
Keyboard Shortcuts - Cmd+T (file finder), Cmd+Shift+F (fuzzy finder), Cmd+Shift+P (command palette), Cmd+F (find/replace), Cmd+J (terminal)
File Tree - Open folder, navigate files, refresh
Fuzzy Finder - Quick file search and preview
Find and Replace - Search with case sensitivity, replace one or all
WakaTime Config - API key and URL settings
